content: The Economist article discusses the escalating economic, social, and human costs associated with continuous armed conflict. It argues that protracted wars drain national resources, undermine global economic stability, and perpetuate cycles of violence and social disruption. The piece highlights how sustained warfare disrupts trade, degrades infrastructure, exacerbates inequality, and imposes long-term psychological burdens on societies. It calls for a strategic shift toward diplomatic solutions and peaceful conflict resolution to break this costly cycle.

title: Agent v1.31.0 发布 | 全新 Easysearch 向导：一站式集群拉起与精细化管理
content: INFINI Agent v1.31.0 introduces an Easysearch installation wizard that removes the need for manual configuration. The GUI allows users to deploy or join clusters in development or production mode, handling download, JDK setup, certificate generation, parameter tuning, plugin installation, and node startup with progress monitoring and pause/resume. The wizard pre‑checks system compatibility, port usage, storage, and SSL validity, supports auto‑or manual certificates (shared or separate), and provides ongoing cluster management features such as node control, plugin updates, configuration edits, and integrated log viewing. Proxy support enables operation in restricted networks.

title: 四评 DeepSeek

title: GPT-5.5，刚刚泄露了
content: An accidental leak on OpenAI’s Codex platform exposed several internal model names—including GPT‑5.5, Glacier, Heisenberg, and Arcanine—to paying Pro users. The leak revealed that a staging environment had been mistakenly pushed to production, showing a hidden dropdown menu. GPT‑5.5 is described as an agentic coding model, while Glacier and Heisenberg suggest new architectures and a life‑science focus. OpenAI patched the issue quickly, but the incident highlighted the depth of their unseen product lines and sparked debate over whether it was a mere flaw or deliberate marketing.

This spike follows Anthropic’s rapid revenue growth and the introduction of Claude Code, a product that extends coding and agent capabilities, making it a promising infrastructure player. OpenAI’s high starting valuation and extensive market visibility have capped its upside, while Anthropic’s limited shares and faster narrative updates fuel higher demand. The shift reflects investors prioritizing revenue potential and market entry control over pure model performance.

title: 一个鉴定抄袭博主，和他揭开的丑事 | 原文
content: In October 2024, a TikTok user named Wang Hao, under the handle “Poetic Forest,” began posting side‑by‑side comparisons of literary works to expose plagiarism. Initial posts gathered little attention, but over time he amassed support from victims and even forced some accused authors to apologize. He examined more than 40 writers, notably Jia Ping‑wo and newcomer Yang Benfen, creating many enemies amid the complicated literary community. Critics accused him of profiteering and being a “professional plagiarist detector,” while his investigations also sparked backlash from some readers. The 16‑month campaign left writers and audiences divided over allegations of theft versus the value of original creation.

title: 一个对话框、一只青蛙、一周4万用户，Ribbi做对了什么？
content: Ribbi is a multimodal creative tool that acts as an AI “person” managing the entire content‑creation cycle: idea generation, production, publishing, and performance analysis. Users chat with Ribbi—a frog‑personified interface—in a single dialog box, avoiding multiple plug‑ins or canvas tools. It learns user aesthetics via a “Pond” feature, stores workflows as “Skills,” and refines its outputs by monitoring social‑media data. Ribbi’s small, tightly‑coordinated team prioritizes low context loss and rapid iteration, attracting 40,000 users in its first week.

Xiaomi aims to integrate the model into edge devices for broad AI application.

content: Tesla’s China car system will incorporate the “Doubao” generative AI model and DeepSeek Chat by August 2025, after completing Shanghai’s new AI service filing. In July 2025, Tesla activated the Grok language model in the U.S. The company’s 2026 Q1 deliveries grew 6.3% year‑over‑year but fell 14.4% from the previous quarter; Shanghai’s plant hit a monthly delivery record in March, and Q1 overall sales rose 23.5% YoY. Tesla denied rumors of a new electric SUV; it plans to launch a six‑seat Model YL in China in August 2025.

title: OpenAI 推出 ChatGPT Images 2.0 图像模型
content: OpenAI has released GPT‑Image‑2, officially named ChatGPT Images 2.0, its first image model with “thinking” capability. The model tops the large‑model competition, scoring 240 points in the text‑to‑image task and outperforming the second‑place Nano Banana 240.

title: 苹果 Siri 主管洛克威尔考虑离职，Vision Pro 功臣陷职业迷茫
content: Apple executive Mike Lockewell, who led the Siri revamp, is weighing departure or a transition to an advisory role after a restructuring that shifted his reporting line to the software head. The change, coupled with a lack of clear career growth, has raised his doubts. While the initial Vision Pro launch missed market expectations, Bloomberg noted Lockewell’s exit before Siri’s upgrade seems unlikely. Meanwhile, other hardware team members, including Kate Bergeron, are unsettled, and Apple faces challenges in retaining core talent amid CEO‑transition plans.

title: OpenAI CEO 奥尔特曼抨击 Anthropic：为 Mythos「制造恐慌式营销」
content: Sam Altman, CEO of OpenAI, criticized Anthropic for its new Mythos safety model, saying the company exaggerates its effectiveness by playing on fears about technology. Altman argued that Mythos is presented as a tool against cybercrime but actually creates unnecessary technical barriers, reflecting a broader industry trend of leveraging perceived danger to appear powerful. He highlighted concerns about monopolistic practices and urged clearer boundaries for AI safety discussions.

title: 爱奇艺高管回应 AI 演员争议：超 100 位艺人已入驻纳豆 Pro，AI 生成内容将经演员本人确认
content: In 2026, iQIYI announced that over 100 deep‑partner artists have joined its AI‑actor platform, Natto Pro, after confirming AI‑generated content with the actors. Some artists who have not signed AI authorisation have publicly criticized the move. iQIYI’s executives said the platform will boost popularity and efficiency while maintaining creative integrity, and that AI content will gradually be accepted commercially. Natto Pro, now fully commercial, integrates popular and in‑house models, is open to all creators, and offers revenue share and support for video production.

title: Meta 将捕捉员工鼠标移动与击键操作，用于 AI 模型训练
content: Meta installs “Model Capability Initiative” tracking software on US employee computers to record mouse movements, clicks, keystrokes, and screenshots for AI model training. The data helps improve AI agents that can autonomously perform work tasks. Meta says it protects sensitive content and uses the information solely for training. The company is advancing AI‑driven workflows while announcing a global workforce reduction of 10% starting May 20, with potential further cuts.

title: 如何加强民主的武器库
content: The article discusses ways to strengthen democratic institutions by expanding the tools and strategies that protect and promote liberty. It highlights measures such as improving civic education, ensuring transparent governance, protecting free speech, and fostering pluralistic political competition. The piece argues that a robust “arsenal of democracy” relies on a mix of legal frameworks, institutional checks, and active citizen participation to resist authoritarian pressures and sustain democratic resilience.

title: 欧洲是如何通过自我监管沦为美国的附庸的
content: Europe’s regulatory approach has increasingly mirrored that of the United States, leading to a dependence on American standards and practices. European institutions and industries have adopted U.S.-driven policies, technologies, and enforcement mechanisms, often at the expense of independent European frameworks. This alignment has resulted in reduced autonomy for European regulators, who now rely on U.S. guidance and market structures to shape their own regulations. As a consequence, Europe’s self‑regulation has transformed into a form of vassalage to American interests.

content: Crypto miners are increasingly infiltrating personal and business computers, quietly using their processing power for mining operations. The covert activity raises concerns about resource consumption, security, and potential performance degradation, as unauthorized software often remains undetected until significant impact occurs. Users and organizations must monitor system activity and employ security tools to identify and mitigate such hidden mining processes.

title: 如何防止色盲松鸡飞进滑雪缆车
content: Preventing colour‑blind grouse from flying into ski lifts involves trapping them elsewhere. Utilizing bird‑trapping nets around nearby gardens keeps birds from wandering. Removing food sources outside the skier’s reach stops them seeking shelter. Lowering light intensity during windy conditions reduces fine‑grain pollen that attracts birds. Regularly trimming or removing robin‑shaped seedlings discourages habitation indoors. Installing these measures, alone or combined, effectively keeps colour‑blind grouse away from ski lift lines.

title: 小米 mimo 升级 v2.5,并且重置了额度
content: Xiaomi’s MiMo‑V2.5 series has entered public beta on the MiMo Open Platform. The new token plan supports V2.5 models, adds a nighttime 0.8× credits rate, offers continuous monthly and annual subscriptions with discounts, and resets all users’ used credits. MiMo‑V2.5 and Pro models feature higher AI capabilities, full‑modal support, and improved TTS, while the TTS tier gets upgraded voice quality and cloning. The models will soon be globally open‑source.

The text argues that the smartest people gravitate to financial markets for five reasons: it is the most level playing field, rewarding sound judgment over connections; it converts insight into wealth rapidly; it attracts global top talent, making competition intense; it offers no excuses, delivering brutal outcomes for mistakes; and it exhausts one's cognitive, disciplinary, and risk‑management limits, reshaping survivors into stronger decision makers. Thus, it warns that the most intelligent may become foolish there.

title: 研究：全球清洁能源增长指向永久性转变 | 原文
content: A global study indicates that clean‑energy electricity generation grew faster than overall power demand last year, reflecting a structural shift away from fossil fuels. This trend, driven largely by rapid solar growth and also wind, nuclear, geothermal, and biofuels, has caused a slight decline in annual fossil‑fuel plant output—the first such drop since the 2020 pandemic. Analysts expect the transition to continue beyond the current Middle East conflict.
